hero.headline: The Prophet's ﷺ Sunnah — your flavor.

story.title: More than just a miswak
story.body: SIWAKY was born from love of the Sunnah and a passion for craft. We hand-pick the finest arak twigs from the Arabian Peninsula and pair them with four curated flavors — returning miswak to its rightful place in modern life.

flavors.title: Four luxury flavors
flavors.sub: Each box contains 12 sticks — 3 of each flavor

sunnah.hadith: “Were it not for the hardship on my nation, I would have ordered them to use miswak at every prayer.”

howTo.title: How to use miswak
steps: Gently peel the tip of the stick
Rinse the stick with water after use
Use up to three times daily before prayer

about.title: The story of SIWAKY
about.body: SIWAKY was born from a simple idea: that the Prophet's ﷺ Sunnah deserves the finest expression. We at EMYRA LTD, a UK-registered company, chose to revive the Sunnah of miswak with a touch of authentic Arabian luxury — hand-picked arak twigs, four natural flavors, packaging worthy of any occasion.
about.mission: To restore miswak to its rightful place in modern life — with global halal certification, fast delivery and cash on delivery.
